perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video begins with a woman in a pink top and white skirt standing in a Costco warehouse, pointing at a giant inflatable Christmas bear on a shelf. (2) Camera cuts between her gestures and the bear, then pans down to show boxes of the product and a price tag. (3) The woman walks through the store aisles with a shopping cart, reaching another display area. (4) She stops at a shelf with gingerbread man plush toys, touching one and smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, holiday-themed music with jingling bells and a rhythmic beat starts. A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin about the Christmas bear. (2) An off-screen male voice responds, creating a conversational tone. Sound effects (pings) coincide with text overlays. (3) Ambient noise of a large retail store is faintly audible behind the music. (4) The female voice continues to describe the products as she moves, maintaining a high-pitched, energetic tone until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 8399元買不買? 巨大聖誕小熊 (Hook: Questioning the price). (2) 一定要買這個 (Decorative: Urgency). (3) 哪一個 (Functional: Dialogue). (4) 小熊啊 聖誕節要到了 (Functional: Narrative context). (5) 8399 有附地樁繩索 (Functional: Product details). (6) 可以等特價399的時候來買 (Decorative/Humorous: Sarcasm/Hook). (7) 這個好可愛 我也喜歡這個 (Decorative: Emotional expression).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro to product -> Humor/Dialogue about price -> Transition to new product

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 female shoppers in background, 1 male arm visible briefly near cart
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a light pink short-sleeved top and a white textured skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse store interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, large quantities of Christmas decorations (trees, bears, reindeer), and shopping carts.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle/shopping vlog designed to entertain viewers while showcasing Christmas seasonal products at Costco. It uses humor (the joke about waiting for a 399 price tag) and high-energy presentation to engage the audience in a relatable 'shopping trip' experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is actively showcasing specific products with prices inside a branded store (Costco).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and dialogue with an off-screen cameraman.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young adults/shoppers in Taiwan interested in seasonal home decor and wholesale shopping trends.
